engagementShape: advisory retainer covering Q3, with option to convert into an implementation engagement
introContext: AE found Joist AI on the AECTech 2026 sponsor list and reached out via their site form. No referral; no prior relationship.
callObjective: Determine whether Joist AI's AI proposal-writing product is the start of a broader AI-for-AEC-marketing platform play, or a feature in someone else's roadmap. Decide if there is a credible advisory engagement to propose.
hypothesis: Joist AI's proposal-writing AI is a wedge product, not the destination. The CEO/Head of Product is thinking about whether to extend into adjacent AEC marketing/BD workflows (RFP tracking, win/loss analysis, account intelligence). They likely have ML talent for the wedge but not enough to ship a platform — Arvaya's advisory + selective implementation help could shorten that path.
meetingContext: Cold outbound. The AE has read the company's public marketing but has no prior conversation history. This call is intent-discovery: figure out where Joist AI's roadmap actually points and whether Arvaya's wedge fits.
